claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: Exactly one consumer element with unchanged semantics and accessible name.
semantics.unmountedState: No DOM is emitted only after exit completion or when initially absent.

lifecycle.defaultEntry: Present server content begins visible and entered; JavaScript is not required to reveal it.
lifecycle.exit: The element remains mounted until a root transition/animation end event reaches the declared deadline or the authoritative timeout expires; shorter property events are ignored.
lifecycle.reducedMotion: Explicit or provider reduce preference unmounts without a motion delay.
lifecycle.interruption: A new present=true transition cancels pending exit cleanup.
lifecycle.enhancementOptOut: initialEnter=false omits the initial entering lifecycle; absent onExitComplete emits no callback; absent reducedMotion follows provider policy.

consumerResponsibilities: Do not move focus merely because presence state changes.
Before removing focused content, choose and document a logical focus destination.
Keep exitDurationMs aligned with the longest custom CSS transition or animation including delay.
Never make essential information available only during an animation.
